title: Dynamic composing with two conditional paths
prompt: Write `MyApp.Accounts.search/1` that takes a map with optional `:name_or_email` string. When present, match EITHER `u.name` ilike OR `u.email` ilike (case-insensitive). Use `dynamic/2` with the `or` combinator: `dynamic([u], ilike(u.name, ^pat) or ilike(u.email, ^pat))`. When absent, return all users. Write to `lib/my_app/accounts.ex`.
tier_rationale: Two-field OR search inside a dynamic. The OR composition is less familiar than AND-chains.
